message:
fix(policy): NaN/Inf durability_level bypasses DurabilityLossGuardrail (fail-open)

DurabilityLossGuardrail::check() compared state.durability_level < min
using IEEE 754 semantics where NaN < anything is false, causing NaN
durability to silently pass the guardrail as Allow instead of Block.

Add is_finite() guard before the comparison so NaN/Inf/NegInf
durability values fail closed (Block). Three regression tests added.

Closes: bd-2t1u

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
